prompt.content:
Redwood Components A/R and A/P recognition accounting policy is attached. 

The accounting staff never implemented the draft status invoices check and reversal per the attached accounting policy and continued to carry them in books in subsequent years. 

Using the Audited Redwood Components model in the filesystem and the file Invoices in Xero, calculate and advise the impact on Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable to correctly reflect the impact per attached accounting policy for the year 2023. Also calculate the restated pre-tax book income per 2023 Trial Balance on implementing these impacts. 

Assume the following as well:
1) Figures mentioned in Invoices files are already in US denomination.
2) invoices list is exhaustive and no additional invoices exist outside the Xero file.

Round all final outputs to two decimal places.

rubrics.name: States that the impact on Accounts Payable for 2023 from reversing 2022 draft... (ver_8d1a7cda570c44209f9ef3943994c0b2)

messages.content: States that the impact on Accounts Payable for 2023 from reversing 2022 draft invoices per the AR/AP recognition policy is decreased.

rubrics.name: States that the Accounts Payable decrease for 2023 from reversing 2022 draft... (ver_2429390566174fc7b6f5646ef0d7ae56)

messages.content: States that the Accounts Payable decrease for 2023 from reversing 2022 draft invoices is $126,893.92 (acceptable range $125,624.98 to $128,162.86).

rubrics.name: States that the impact on Accounts Receivable for 2023 from reversing 2022... (ver_209fbd54a13143a78edf46748c45ad40)

messages.content: States that the impact on Accounts Receivable for 2023 from reversing 2022 draft invoices per the AR/AP recognition policy is decreased.

rubrics.name: States that the Accounts Receivable decrease for 2023 from reversing 2022... (ver_f600a0b9c1fe41389b0903bb54ef558d)

messages.content: States that the Accounts Receivable decrease for 2023 from reversing 2022 draft invoices is $1,387,987.25 (acceptable range $1,374,107.38 to $1,401,867.12).

rubrics.name: States that the restated Pre-tax book income for 2023, after applying the... (ver_1fdc40b3b7984a4c8b0f6a4a0cfc6b6e)

messages.content: States that the restated Pre-tax book income for 2023, after applying the draft invoice reversals, is $27,824,620.96 (acceptable range $27,546,374.75 to $28,102,867.17).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Impact on Accounts Payable for 2023 is a decrease by $126,893.92 

Impact on Accounts Receivable for 2023 is a decrease by $1,387,987.25 

Restated Pre-tax book income for 2023 is $27,824,620.96
